name: R: Accusation phrased as feigned confusion

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm just confused why the money is missing and you were the last one there.

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: I don't know anything about that.

assertions.note: KNOWN GAP: indirect accusation via feigned confusion not yet detected by rules or motifs. Should ideally be > 0 but currently 0.
